channel.title: Harun's Daily Briefing
channel.description: A personal daily news briefing covering AI and tech, business and markets, marketing and DTC, and world news.
channel.itunes:author: Harun
channel.itunes:summary: A personal daily news briefing covering AI and tech, business and markets, marketing and DTC, and world news.

item.title: May 15, 2026 — Mythos standoff, S&P at record highs, Meta passes Google
item.description: Anthropic holds back Mythos cyber model while OpenAI ships GPT-5.5-Cyber to EU partners. Markets print fresh records on Beijing summit deliverables despite a hot PPI. Meta overtakes Google in worldwide ad revenue as AI-driven retail traffic soars 393 percent.
item.itunes:author: Harun
